Case# CTWritingDirection.natural

iOSiPadOSMac CatalystmacOStvOSvisionOSwatchOS

```
case natural
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/coretext/ctwritingdirection/natural#Discussion)

The writing direction is algorithmically determined using the Unicode Bidirectional Algorithm rules P2 and P3.
